description_long: This is a high-top sneaker with a bold, multicolored design featuring black as the primary color, accented by red, yellow, and green. The shoe has a classic canvas upper, with a rubber toe cap and a thick, flat rubber sole. The laces are arranged in a standard criss-cross pattern and alternate in red, yellow, and green, matching the overall color scheme. On the outer side, there is a circular patch logo with a star, reminiscent of Converse All Star branding, and subtle text details are visible near the ankle. The sole is predominantly red at the front and yellow at the back, with a striped pattern on the heel. The shoe appears clean, structurally intact, and shows no visible signs of wear.
description: A vibrant high-top sneaker with black canvas, multicolored laces, and a red-yellow-green color scheme, featuring a circular side logo and a thick rubber sole.
description_view_0: Front view shows the criss-cross lacing in red, yellow, and green, the black tongue, and the red toe bumper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the black canvas upper, multicolored eyelets and laces, and the yellow and red sole with subtle text near the ankle.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the striped red and yellow heel, the black back seam, and the gradient green upper section.
description_view_3: Right side view features the circular logo patch, the full lacing system, and the color-blocked sole.
attribute_logo: Circular patch with a star on the outer ankle, yellow and red with black text
